stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":2,"creativity-free-response":"The game had very simple instructions and controls, and was on a very dark background, which did not seem too creative. It felt like it was inspired by Pac-Man, which is a very popular game, but for it to be inspired by it feels uninspiring.","originality-rating":1,"originality-free-response":"It had the same controls and similar gameplay mechanics to Pac-Man, where there are enemies around the map trying to catch you while you try to retrieve something. The very dark aesthetic was interesting, but it was not done originally or creatively. ","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"I enjoyed the game, even though it was so simple. The functionality was very simple, and everything worked as it should with little to no issues. I found how simple it was to be very enjoyable, and nothing came off as super frustrating aside from the fact that I could not beat the game. ","authenticity-rating":2,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"The game did not feel super authentic, as it felt like a different version of Pac-Man. It was ripping off the idea. The intentionality and effort were adequate, as some effort went into the game, and there was some clear differentiation with the addition of the relic, but not enough to make it super inspiring. "}

response: {"creativity-rating":5,"creativity-free-response":"The concept of the game was very creative; it had various working parts and required problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and being quick on your feet to avoid making as many errors as possible. ","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"The game felt very original and novel; it had strategic mechanics, a very compelling narrative and visually interesting aesthetics. that added to the overall feel of the game. ","effectiveness-rating":5,"effectiveness-free-response":"The game was very enjoyable to play.
